task_objective: Run test reports in both default themes using 10M x 20 cols of varied customer data
design_decisions: Created a custom data generation script for 10M x 20 customer data using Polars and Faker.
Used 'minimal' mode for the profiler to ensure fast execution on 10M rows.
Used 'ydata-like' for the second theme as per the code's ALLOWED_THEMES.
results: Successfully generated four reports (minimal and full for both default and ydata-like themes) in /tmp/ibis-profiling/.
